# Chapter 8 Enabling and Disabling EGMs

Use the EGM Enable/Disable feature to enable or disable individual machines and to assign
specific enable/disable schedules to groups of machines on the casino floor.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/147.2.png)




If the IGT Advantage Machine Accounting system is connected to the IGT sbX
system, the serial numbers of all machines enrolled in Machine Accounting must
match the cabinet serial numbers in the IGT sbX system.

Asset numbers from Machine Accounting are enrolled automatically within the sbX
system. View these asset numbers using sbX My Casino.


## 8.1 Viewing the EGM Enable / Disable Window

To view the EGM Enable / Disable window:

Navigate to IGT Spade > Floor > EGM Enable / Disable. The EGM Enable / Disable
window opens.




![Figure 8-1 EGM Enable and Disable](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/147.3.png)




<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="147" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 8 Enabling and Disabling EGMs" -->


## 8.2 Enabling Machines

To enable machines:

1\. Navigate to IGT Spade > Floor > EGM Enable and Disable. The EGM Enable /
Disable window opens.

2\. Select the desired machines using one of the following methods:

· Machine Filters (left pane):

Click Apply Filters to select machines that match the filter values indicated in the
drop-down boxes.

· Click Select All from the Machine Filters area to select all machines.

· Select one or more machines:

· Left-click a single machine.

· Left-click two or more machines while holding down CTRL.

· Left-click a single machine, then left-click another machine while holding down
SHIFT to select a range of machines.

· Left-click a Machine List to select all of the machines in a specific group.

3\. Click Enable. The selected machines are enabled.


## 8.3 Disabling Machines

To disable machines:

1\. Navigate to IGT Spade > Floor > EGM Enable and Disable. The EGM Enable /
Disable window opens.

2\. Select the desired machines using one of the following methods:

· Machine Filters (left pane):

· Click Apply Filters to select machines that match the filter values indicated in the
drop-down boxes.

· Click Select All from the Machine Filters area to select all machines.

· Select one or more machines:

· Left-click a single machine.

· Left-click two or more machines while holding down CTRL.

· Left-click a single machine, then left-click another machine while holding down
SHIFT to select a range of machines.

· Left-click a Machine List to select all of the machines in a specific group.

3\. Click Disable. The selected machines are disabled.


## 8.4 EGM Groups

EGM groups can be created, assigned to a group, activated, renamed, or deleted.

<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="148" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 8 Enabling and Disabling EGMs" -->


### 8.4.1 Creating New Groups

To create a new group:

1\. Navigate to IGT Spade > Floor > EGM Enable / Disable. The EGM Enable / Disable
window opens.

2\. Right-click Groups, then select Add Group. The Enter Group Name window appears.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/149.1.png)




3\. Enter the Group Name, then click OK. The new EGM group is created.


### 8.4.2 Assigning Machines to Groups

To assign machines to a group:

1\. Select IGT Spade > Floor > EGM Enable and Disable. The EGM Enable / Disable
window opens.

2\. Select a group name listed in the Main EGM Enable and Disable window.

3\. Right-click a Machine List, then select Add / Remove Machines. The Add / Remove
Machines from Group window appears.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/149.2.png)

Adding or removing machines cannot be accomplished from the "Entire Floor"
group.

4\. Click the Up and Down arrows to add or remove machines from the group.

5\. Click OK when complete. The EGM group updates.


### 8.4.3 Adding Groups

The following steps detail how to activate, deactivate, rename, and delete a group.


#### To activate a group:

1\. Select IGT Spade > Floor > EGM Enable and Disable. The EGM Enable / Disable
window opens.

2\. Right-click a group name listed in the Main EGM Enable and Disable window, then select
Activate Group. A confirmation message appears.

3\. Click Yes. The group is activated.


### 8.4.4 Deactivating Groups

To deactivate a group:

1\. Select IGT Spade > Floor > EGM Enable and Disable. The EGM Enable / Disable
window opens.

2\. Right-click a group name listed in the Main EGM Enable and Disable window, then select
Activate Group. A confirmation message appears.

3\. Click Yes. The group is deactivated.


### 8.4.5 Editing Group Names

To edit a group's name:

1\. Select IGT Spade > Floor > EGM Enable and Disable. The EGM Enable / Disable
window opens.

2\. Right-click a group name listed in the Main EGM Enable and Disable window, then select
Edit Group Name. The Enter Group Name window appears.

3\. Enter a name in the Please enter the group name field, then click OK. The group's name
changes.


### 8.4.5.1 Deleting Groups

To delete a group:

1\. Select IGT Spade > Floor > EGM Enable and Disable. The EGM Enable / Disable
window opens.

2\. Right-click a group name listed in the Main EGM Enable and Disable window, then select
Delete Group. A confirmation message appears.

3\. Click Yes. The group is deleted.

<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="150" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 8 Enabling and Disabling EGMs" -->


## 8.5 Schedules

Create schedules to enable or disable groups of EGMs automatically.


### 8.5.1 Creating Schedules

To create a schedule:

1\. Navigate to IGT Spade > Floor > EGM Enable and Disable. The EGM Enable /
Disable window opens.

2\. Right-click Scheduled Tasks under the group to schedule, then click Add / Remove
Schedules. The Add / Remove Schedules from Group window appears.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/151.1.png)




3\. Click Add New. The EGM Enable/Disable Schedule Wizard appears.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/151.2.png)




4\. Click Next. The next screen of the wizard appears.

5\. Enter a description (name) of the schedule in the Please enter a schedule description field.

<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="151" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 8 Enabling and Disabling EGMs" -->

6\. Select Schedule enabled? to activate the schedule.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/152.1.png)




7\. Select a schedule for the task in the Perform this task pane: One Time Only, Daily,
Weekly, or Monthly.

8\. Click Next. The next screen of the wizard appears.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/152.2.png)




9\. Select Disable on to disable a schedule at a specified date and time OR Enable on to
enable the schedule at a specified date and time.

10\. Select a date and time.

11\. Click Add exclusion date to enter any exclusion dates and times for the schedule.

12\. Click Next. The next page of the wizard appears.

<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="152" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 8 Enabling and Disabling EGMs" -->




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/153.1.png)




13\. To disable the schedule at a specified time and date, select Disable on, then enter a
disable date and time.

14\. Click Finish. The schedule is created.


### 8.5.2 Deleting Schedules

To add or remove schedules:

1\. Navigate to IGT Spade > Floor > EGM Enable and Disable. The EGM Enable /
Disable window opens.

2\. Right-click Scheduled Tasks for a specific group OR for the entire floor, then click
Add/Remove Schedules. The Add / Remove Schedules from Group window appears.

3\. Select a schedule from the Available Schedule list, then click Delete. The Available
Schedules pane no longer displays the deleted schedule.

4\. Click OK. The Add / Remove Schedules from Group window closes.
